req-auth-001.description: Initialize Supabase client with environment config (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)

req-auth-002.description: Provide AuthContext with current user, loading state, and auth methods (signIn, signUp, signOut)

req-auth-003.description: Email/password sign up with email confirmation flow

req-auth-004.description: Email/password sign in with session persistence across page reloads

req-auth-005.description: Protected route wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users to login

req-auth-006.description: Login and signup UI components with form validation and error handling
